title: The Importance of a Balanced Diet
passage:
The Importance of a Balanced Diet

A balanced diet is essential for maintaining good health and well-being. It provides the body with the necessary nutrients to function effectively. A balanced diet consists of a variety of foods from all food groups: fruits, vegetables, proteins, dairy, and grains. Each food group offers different nutrients that contribute to our overall health.

Fruits and vegetables are rich in vitamins, minerals, and fiber. They help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes. It is recommended to consume at least five servings of fruits and vegetables each day. On the other hand, proteins are crucial for the growth and repair of tissues. Sources of protein include meat, fish, eggs, beans, and nuts.

Dairy products are important for bone health due to their high calcium content. It is advisable to choose low-fat or fat-free options to reduce saturated fat intake. Grains, especially whole grains, provide energy and important nutrients like B vitamins and iron. Incorporating whole grains like brown rice and whole wheat bread can enhance your diet.

Moreover, it is essential to limit the intake of sugar, salt, and unhealthy fats. Excessive consumption of these can lead to health issues such as obesity and high blood pressure. Drinking enough water is also a key component of a healthy diet, as it helps to keep the body hydrated and supports various bodily functions.

In conclusion, a balanced diet leads to better health and longevity. By making informed food choices and enjoying a variety of foods, individuals can maintain their health and prevent diseases.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What is the main purpose of the passage?

options.A: To explain why a balanced diet is crucial for health.
options.B: To suggest specific diets for weight loss.

questions.explanation: The passage focuses on the importance of a balanced diet for health and well-being.

questions.text: A balanced diet should include at least five servings of grains daily.
questions.explanation: The passage states five servings of fruits and vegetables are recommended, not grains.

questions.text: The author believes water is essential for a healthy diet.
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that drinking enough water is a key component of a healthy diet.

questions.instruction: Match the food group with its benefit.

pairs.Proteins: b. Reduces risk of chronic diseases.
pairs.Dairy: c. Crucial for growth and repair.
pairs.Grains: d. Provides energy and B vitamins.

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences with NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS.
questions.text: A balanced diet includes a variety of foods from all food groups, including _____ and _____ .
questions.explanation: The passage emphasizes the importance of including fruits and vegetables in a balanced diet.

vocabulary.meaning: substances that provide nourishment essential for growth and the maintenance of life.
long-lasting conditions that can be controlled but not cured.
a type of fat found in animal products and some plant oils that can raise cholesterol levels.

tactics:
Hướng dẫn

To tackle this passage effectively, focus on the main ideas presented in each paragraph. Pay attention to the specific recommendations regarding food groups and their benefits. Use skimming techniques to quickly identify relevant information for the questions, and remember to look for keywords in the questions that can guide you back to the corresponding parts of the passage.
